original: This ring piercing has been hewn from a solid Adjite and machined with the utmost precision to have a nearly invisible hing mechanism for installation and removal. Opposite the hinge is a weighty sable bulge, intended to provide stimulating weight to whichever part it adorns. The pitch-black obsidian feels slippery in your fingers, the gemstone shining its own blackened, violet light. Samples of Adjite in this quality are few and far between.\n\nIf applied to a high blood flow location, it is sure to cause swelling and very significant increased fluid production while worn.
